title: Autonomous Agents
description: Idle teammates can scan the task board, claim eligible work, and return to idle after completion.

steps.annotation: Autonomy starts from an idle lifecycle tick, not a direct user command.
The idle agent scans the shared task board.
Only unclaimed work is eligible for autonomous pickup.
The task manager enforces ownership before work begins.
The lifecycle moves from IDLE to WORK.
Completion writes the result back to the shared board.
After finishing, the agent becomes available for more work.
